[[File:Gadderanks chathead.png|left]]
'''Gadderanks''' is a blood tithe collector involved in the [[In Aid of the Myreque]] quest. To protect his [[Maria Gadderanks|wife]] and [[Ron Gadderanks|son]] from the [[vampyre]]s Gadderanks works for the vampyres, collecting blood tithes from the inhabitants of [[Morytania]] to sustain their vampyric overlords. In this capacity he is accompanied by two [[Vampyre Juvinate]]s.

Gadderanks is, due to his occupation, one of the most despised [[human]]s in Morytania. When the player kills him, Gadderanks drops the [[Gadderhammer]], particularly powerful against [[Shade (disambiguation)|shade]]s (which he feared).

==In Aid of the Myreque==
During the course of this quest [[Vanstrom Klause]], a Vampyre, discovers the location of the revived [[Burgh de Rott]] and orders Gadderanks, with the Juvinates, to collect tithes from the village. The player, to save the townsfolk from vampyric tyranny and increase their prestige among the villagers, must kill Gadderanks and his bodyguards. As he dies Gadderanks reveals why he undertook the task, is chastised by the player and reveals what [[vampyre]]s are weak to and afraid of. He also implores the player to protect his family from the vampyres.

==Trivia==
* Gadderanks is referenced during [[Desert Treasure I]] by [[Roavar]] and [[Malak]]; his disappearance is the reason for the latter's personally coming to [[Canifis]] to collect the blood tithes.
